key_insight: The shock-to-detonation transition in energetic materials is governed by coupled processes spanning Angstroms to millimeters and femtoseconds to microseconds, where traditional multiscale models fail due to the lack of scale separation.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: composites and metamaterials workflows and research evaluation.
